message:
Add RAII wrapper for libexpat XML_Parser to ensure exception-safe cleanup

This change adds a custom deleter and unique_ptr type alias to manage the
lifetime of the XML_Parser handle, eliminating manual XML_ParserFree() calls
and preventing potential resource leaks in exception scenarios.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
